# MDE v1.5.7

## Features

- Automatically refreshes an open Markdown document when the file is changed on disk by another editor or system tool, as long as the MDE editor has no unsaved local draft.
- Closes the current editor view when the open Markdown file is deleted outside MDE, returning the editor to its empty state instead of showing stale content.
- Validates Recent Files when the panel is expanded and removes Markdown entries that no longer exist on disk.

## Bug Fixes

- Prevents stale editor contents after long-running sessions where a Markdown file was updated externally.
- Prevents missing files from lingering in the current workspace Recent Files list after they are deleted in Finder or another file manager.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a Markdown file existence IPC/preload API for safe renderer-side validation.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for external file refresh, external deletion, and Recent Files validation.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese user manual with external modification synchronization behavior and Recent Files validation notes.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions will publish macOS x64 and arm64 DMG/ZIP artifacts.
- GitHub Actions will publish the Windows x64 NSIS installer and updater metadata.
